name: Ambrosia Salad Mold
recipeIngredient: 8 ounces crushed pineapple in can (juice and reserved)
2 oranges, pared, sectioned and cut up
recipeInstructions:
1. Pour boiling water over the gelatin in a large bowl; stir until the gelatin is dissolved.
2. Add enough cold water from the reserved pineapple juice to measure 1 cup. Stir this into the gelatin mixture.
3. Refrigerate the gelatin mixture until it mounds slightly when dropped from a spoon.
4. Beat the gelatin mixture and sour cream together until light and fluffy.
5. Stir in the pineapple, oranges, and coconut.
6. Pour the mixture into a 6-cup mold.
7. Refrigerate until firm.
8. Garnish with additional orange sections if desired.
8 SERVINGS; 120 CALORIES PER SERVING.
